Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Apr-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Ditullio for Ronald Linder (Administrator).

Ms. Ditullio stated that the IRS issue is resolved, that they got the last refund check in January, that they are working on the final petition and that she can have it on file in 60-days. The Court noted that 60-days is almost a year from the day the Court ordered the filing of the next petition. Status on close of estate is continued to April 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The petition for final distribution is to be filed by March 23, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
